summary: Database migration runner with idempotent tracking and transaction support
side_effects: embeds SQL migration files at compile time
creates migrations tracking table on first run
executes SQL migration files in sorted order
records applied migrations to prevent re-execution
notes: Implements idempotent migration system with transaction-per-migration isolation. Migrations are embedded via //go:embed and sorted alphabetically to ensure deterministic execution order. Migrations table tracks which files have been applied.
